'''âh-sh-p''' ('''kahashap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:validate|validate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:validate|validate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-sh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kahashap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihashap|thihashap]] || [[word:jihashap|jihashap]] || [[word:shihashap|shihashap]] || [[word:kihashap|kihashap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhashap|thuthuhashap]] || [[word:jujuhashap|jujuhashap]] || [[word:shushuhashap|shushuhashap]] || [[word:kukuhashap|kukuhashap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhashap|thuhashap]] || [[word:juhashap|juhashap]] || [[word:shuhashap|shuhashap]] || [[word:kuhashap|kuhashap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhashap|thuhashap]] || [[word:juhashap|juhashap]] || [[word:shuhashap|shuhashap]] || [[word:kuhashap|kuhashap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehashap|thehashap]] || [[word:jehashap|jehashap]] || [[word:shehashap|shehashap]] || [[word:kehashap|kehashap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohashap|thothohashap]] || [[word:jojohashap|jojohashap]] || [[word:shoshohashap|shoshohashap]] || [[word:kokohashap|kokohashap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohashap|thohashap]] || [[word:johashap|johashap]] || [[word:shohashap|shohashap]] || [[word:kohashap|kohashap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohashap|thohashap]] || [[word:johashap|johashap]] || [[word:shohashap|shohashap]] || [[word:kohashap|kohashap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhashap|thĂŠhashap]] || [[word:jĂŠhashap|jĂŠhashap]] || [[word:shĂŠhashap|shĂŠhashap]] || [[word:kĂŠhashap|kĂŠhashap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahashap|thathahashap]] || [[word:jajahashap|jajahashap]] || [[word:shashahashap|shashahashap]] || [[word:kakahashap|kakahashap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahashap|thahashap]] || [[word:jahashap|jahashap]] || [[word:shahashap|shahashap]] || [[word:kahashap|kahashap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahashap|thahashap]] || [[word:jahashap|jahashap]] || [[word:shahashap|shahashap]] || [[word:kahashap|kahashap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahashap|shahashap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahashap|goshahashap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahashap|gokishahashap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahashapnĂŒ|shahashapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahashapnknĂŒ|goshahashapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashapnĂŒ|gokishahashapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahashapshĂ«|shahashapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahashapnkshĂ«|goshahashapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahashapshĂ«|gokishahashapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashapro|shahashapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashapnkro|goshahashapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashapro|gokishahashapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashapmu|shahashapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashapnkmu|goshahashapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashapmu|gokishahashapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahashapsher|shahashapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahashapnksher|goshahashapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahashapsher|gokishahashapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahashapng|shahashapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahashapnkng|goshahashapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahashapng|gokishahashapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahashapya|shahashapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahashapnkya|goshahashapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahashapya|gokishahashapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahashapyam|shahashapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahashapnkyam|goshahashapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahashapyam|gokishahashapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahashapnĂŒshĂ«|shahashapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahashapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahashapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahashapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahashapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashapnĂŒro|shahashapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashapnknĂŒro|goshahashapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashapnĂŒro|gokishahashapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashapnĂŒmu|shahashapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashapnknĂŒmu|goshahashapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashapnĂŒmu|gokishahashapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahashapshĂ«nĂŒ|shahashapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahashapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahashapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahashapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashapshĂ«ro|shahashapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashapnkshĂ«ro|goshahashapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashapshĂ«ro|gokishahashapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashapshĂ«mu|shahashapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashapnkshĂ«mu|goshahashapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashapshĂ«mu|gokishahashapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahashapronĂŒ|shahashapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahashapnkronĂŒ|goshahashapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashapronĂŒ|gokishahashapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahashaproshĂ«|shahashaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahashapnkroshĂ«|goshahashapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahashaproshĂ«|gokishahashaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashapromu|shahashapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashapnkromu|goshahashapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashapromu|gokishahashapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahashapmunĂŒ|shahashapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahashapnkmunĂŒ|goshahashapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashapmunĂŒ|gokishahashapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahashapmushĂ«|shahashapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahashapnkmushĂ«|goshahashapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahashapmushĂ«|gokishahashapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashapmuro|shahashapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashapnkmuro|goshahashapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashapmuro|gokishahashapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
